summary: Iteration 80: Full testing of 3 new product ecosystem pages (Sentinel Lock, Plataforma CRA, ManoProtect Connect). ALL CRITICAL TESTS PASSED. All 3 pages render correctly with all required sections. Alternative routes work. Footer contains all new product links. Alarmas page cross-sell section works. Budget calculator result includes Sentinel Lock cross-sell link. Header navigation with Sentinel Lock button works on pages using LandingHeader component (e.g., /sentinel-x).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 80 verified 3 new product ecosystem pages are fully functional. SentinelLockPage (/sentinel-lock, /cerradura-inteligente), CRAPlatformPage (/plataforma-cra, /central-alarmas), ManoprotectConnectPage (/manoprotect-connect, /app-seguridad) all render correctly with all sections. Footer PRODUCTO column contains Sentinel Lock, App Connect, Plataforma CRA links. Alarmas page (/alarmas-hogar) has sentinel-lock-crosssell section. Budget calculator (/calculador) results include calc-sentinel-lock-link. LandingHeader (used on /sentinel-x, /sentinel-j, etc.) has header-sentinel-lock-btn in desktop and mobile-sentinel-lock-btn in mobile menu.

sentinel_lock_page.title_content: La cerradura que llama a la policia por ti

cra_platform_page.title_content: El cerebro de la seguridad conectada

alarmas_page_crosssell.content: Sentinel Lock: la cerradura que llama a la policia

budget_calculator_crosssell.content: Anade Sentinel Lock - Cerradura inteligente autonoma — 249 EUR

notes.main_landing_page: The main landing page (/) uses HighConversionLanding.js with its own header, not LandingHeader component. The Sentinel Lock button only appears on pages using LandingHeader.
notes.alarmas_page_header: The /alarmas-hogar page (AlarmasSecuritasStyle.js) uses its own internal sticky header, not LandingHeader. The Sentinel Lock cross-sell is at the bottom of the page instead.
notes.cross_navigation: Each ecosystem page (Sentinel Lock, CRA Platform, ManoProtect Connect) has cross-links to the other 2 pages in their ecosystem sections and header navigation.
